command: PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json rule/fixture checks for authority choice C, unique rule versions, required fields, fixture coverage, and zero private/reference fixture values

checks.criterion: signed authority choice C is bound
checks.evidence: rule artifact authority.selected_choice_id is C and decision hash is D7EB784BDF66A46463A26333B7DD55DF873625BE4EB12F8EA2A7CE2DE09C6DDF
every rule has evidence/basis, applicability, exclusions, fixture IDs, fail-closed behavior, and independent-audit requirements

checks.criterion: synthetic coverage exists before behavior promotion
checks.evidence: all 8 rule IDs are covered by at least one synthetic fixture

checks.criterion: hard constraints separated from soft objectives
checks.evidence: rule artifact has top-level hard_constraints and soft_objectives arrays; placement rule blocks soft objective override
fixture private_value_count and reference_value_count are zero for all fixtures; global policy forbids completed references and post-design labels as generator inputs
